emails.subject: FW: ANNGTC MOU
emails.body: FW: ANNGTC MOU Please see the latest revision to the proposed MOU. To: brad reese; Jim Moore; Peter Lund; Steve Patrick; Gadd, Eric; Byron Wright; Murray Birch; cavan carlton

emails.subject: RE: ANNGTC MOU
emails.body: RE: ANNGTC MOU Eric, if I'm reading this correctly, they rejected the suggested changes to Par. 3. They did eliminate the ROFR paragraph. We may want to get on the phone with PGT, El Paso, Sempra before the Tuesday call. DF To: Fossum, Drew; McCarty, Danny; Hill, Robert

emails.subject: FW: ANNGTC MOU
emails.body: FW: ANNGTC MOU All, In the rush to get this MOU completed, Foothills and TCPL have addressed the attached letter to Stan Horton as a single counterparty to the MOU, which is not the agreed way forward. The MOU will be revised again to reflect the fact that all of the parties will appear on one document--not each party executing only with TransCanada, Westcoast and Foothills. Please review and provide comments. Thanks
